text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Kids these days put pictures of their<n>food on the
world wide web, right?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Well, have I got the perfect dishes for<n>that!
Everyone on Umastagram will be<n>sooo jelly!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: You wanna know? Tiramisu and nata decoco! Serve 'em with Italian food, andyou've got the hottest spread around!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
I'm sure you'll get lots of "Looks" with<n>that
combo!
